body.title: Complete DSN hardcode migration: ~50 remaining choose_a_password refs in wild_igor/ and lab/
body.result: replaced all choose_a_password fallbacks with os.environ['IGOR_HOME_DB_URL']/paths().home_db_url; 52 files in wild_igor/ and lab/; d3716e3b
body.description:
T-hardcoded-instance-refs was closed as "done" but ~50+ hardcoded DSN refs remain in committed source (public GitHub). Found by T-credential-boundary-audit.

Correct pattern (paths.py:52): read IGOR_HOME_DB_URL from env, raise RuntimeError if unset — never silent-fallback.

**Affected files (wild_igor/ — 8 cognition/tool modules):**
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/activate.py:25
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/dreaming.py:30
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/focus_state.py:33
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/narrative_engine.py:1245 (HIGH-inertia — pre-approve before touching)
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/playbook.py:27
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/proposals.py:23
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/watch_problems.py:125
- wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain_priors.py:27

**Affected files (lab/ — ~30+ seed/util scripts):**
audit_runner.py, audit_telemetry.py, book_learner.py, cc_hook_pending.py, cc_queue.py (2× silent-fallback), cron_feed_reading.py, debug_session_cli.py, drain_learn_queue.py, map_igor.py, reading_campaign.py, review_manager.py, seed_*.py (~20 files), slate_manager.py, sprint_infrastructure_brief.py, ticket_prefix_refit.py, lab/tools/build_ebook_index.py, lab/utility_closet/failover.py

**Design rules:**
- wild_igor/ modules: use paths().home_db_url (hard-fails if env unset)
- lab/ scripts: os.environ.get("IGOR_HOME_DB_URL") with explicit error message; never silent fallback to literal
- cc_queue.py: remove hardcoded fallback strings at lines 130 and 383

**Scope boundary:** Replace hardcoded DSN literals with env-var reads. Do NOT change the Postgres password, docker-compose defaults, or installer bootstrap (those are acceptable per audit).

**Test plan:** After migration, `grep -r 'choose_a_password' wild_igor/ lab/ --include='*.py'` returns only audit_check_hardcoded_instance.py (the checker) and installer.py (bootstrapper). Run python run test.
